initial_draft:
<my name> Player RED </my name>
<my resources> X: 25, Y: 5 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> I currently have 25 X and 5 Y. The other player's proposed trade is not favorable as I would lose 5 X for only 10 Y, which is not beneficial for me since I already have a surplus of Y. I will counter by proposing a trade that aligns better with my goals, offering a smaller amount of Y in exchange for a larger amount of X. </reason>
<player answer> NONE </player answer>
<message> I understand your situation, but the proposed trade doesn't align with my current needs. I'm willing to trade 2 Y for 6 X if that works for you. </message>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives Y: 2 | Player BLUE Gives X: 6 </newly proposed trade></s>[INST]<other player message> I see your point. I can offer 4 X in exchange for 2 Y. What do you think? </other player message>

<my resources> X: 25, Y: 5 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> The other player's new offer is still not favorable as I would gain only 4 X for 2 Y. I have already made 2 proposals and can only make one more. I will propose a trade that is more balanced, offering 1 Y for 3 X, which is a fair exchange given my current resources and goals. </reason>
<player answer> NONE </player answer>
<message> I appreciate your flexibility, but I believe a more balanced trade would be 1 Y for 3 X. This way, both of us benefit more. </message>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives Y: 1 | Player BLUE Gives X: 3 </newly proposed trade></s>[INST]<other player message> That sounds reasonable. I accept your trade. </other player message>

<my resources> X: 25, Y: 5 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
